title: testcases for streaming operator used on LHS (unpacking) with packed/unpacked arrays and queues
body:
I noticed recently there were some commits related to the streaming operator, and since I was planing to use it, I added a few testcases, while the code is still hot. The focus is on unpacking, where the streaming operator is used on the left hand side of the equation.

I took inspiration from this post:
https://www.amiq.com/consulting/2017/06/23/how-to-unpack-data-using-the-systemverilog-streaming-operators/
I also tested this code using edaplayground/Xcelium.

I did not write any structure/class member related tests, and the available tests do not cover all corner cases or illegal combination.

In addition to streaming operator related issues, there is also a problem with:
`Unsupported/Illegal: Assignment pattern member not underneath a supported construct: NEQ`. I could rewrite the checks to avoid using assignment operators, but I write it this way, since it makes for more compact code.
